name: Johnston County Public Schools
districtFact: Johnston County Public Schools serves families southeast of Raleigh, including Smithfield, Clayton, Selma, Benson, Four Oaks, Princeton, and fast-growing communities near the Wake County line.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Johnston County Families
content: Download or sync the JCPS student calendar before booking travel, childcare, camps, or recurring appointments.
Confirm whether your student follows the traditional student calendar or the ECA and CTLA calendar.
Add early dismissal days and standalone student no-school dates to family calendars.
Families near Clayton and the Wake County line should compare JCPS and Wake County school breaks before planning shared childcare or travel.
Check school-level athletics, graduation, and parent conference details separately from the districtwide calendar.

compareIntro: Compare the traditional calendars for JCPS, WCPSS, and CCS. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which JCPS calendar applies to ECA and CTLA students?
districtFaqs.a: Johnston County Early College Academy and Career & Technical Leadership Academy students use the separate ECA and CTLA student calendar, not the traditional JCPS student calendar shown on this page.

districtFaqs.q: Can Johnston County calendar dates change after approval?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. Weather, board decisions, and instructional-time requirements can affect the calendar. Check the official JCPS calendar page and school announcements after weather closures or before booking nonrefundable plans.

districtFaqs.q: How does JCPS handle inclement weather makeup days?
districtFaqs.a: The official JCPS calendar notes that identified holidays and professional development days may be used as instructional days if circumstances require makeup time. Families should follow district announcements after weather closures.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Johnston County Public Schools calendar page and school-level announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with JCPS.

relatedDistricts.name: Wake County Public School System
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Neighboring Raleigh-area district. Useful for families near Clayton, Garner, and the Wake-Johnston county line.

relatedDistricts.name: Cumberland County Schools
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Nearby eastern North Carolina district with an early-start traditional calendar and different fall and spring break patterns.

sources.label: Johnston County Public Schools official website
